description: For the subtle stamp of sophistication in your ensemble, this pair of heels from catwalk are the best bet. Styled in understated tones, classic cuts and a surprising rivet and buckle embellishment on the front, this shoe nails all of this season's hottest trends. Wear this with dressy ensembles for a roguish touch of the Texas cowgirl. Heels: 2.7"UpperLeather upper with no fussy overlaysMetal buckle and rivet embellishment on the frontSoft fabric liningPadded synthetic leather sockliner for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with terraced gooves on the heelShoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
